rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Amata Anantaprayoon, Patrik Olson
rule_metadata.title: Potential Splashtop Interactive Session

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Splashtop Interactive Session
id: 1773d6b8-2854-417a-a0be-06037ef47a43
description: Potential Splashtop Interactive Session based on high byte count
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson, Amata Anantaprayoon, Patrik Olson
references:
- https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa23-075a
date: '2023-11-27'
modified: '2023-11-27'
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    cs-host|endswith: relay.splashtop.com
    bytes_out|gte: 10000
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Non-interactive Splashtop related traffic, it is only an educated guess that interactive
  traffic has a high bytes count due to to it happening so rarely.
- Benign Splashtop usage if the tool is normally used by the organisation
level: medium
tags:
- attack.command_and_control
